title: InputSampler
description: The InputSampler class is a utility for collecting samples and writing a partition file for the TotalOrderPartitioner. It provides three types of sampling logic: SplitSampler, RandomSampler, and IntervalSampler. SplitSampler samples the first n records from s splits, RandomSampler samples from random points in the input, and IntervalSampler samples from s splits at regular intervals. The InputSampler class takes an InputFormat, a Job, and a Sampler as input, and it returns a subset of the keys from the input data.

TITLE: InputSampler

DESCRIPTION:
The InputSampler class is a utility for collecting samples and writing a partition file for the TotalOrderPartitioner. It provides three types of sampling logic: SplitSampler, RandomSampler, and IntervalSampler. SplitSampler samples the first n records from s splits, RandomSampler samples from random points in the input, and IntervalSampler samples from s splits at regular intervals. The InputSampler class takes an InputFormat, a Job, and a Sampler as input, and it returns a subset of the keys from the input data.
